name: AirActivePro API
description:
This document aims at providing a complete and exhaustive description of AirActive API.
Clients connecting to Air Active service needs to fetch a valid token to initiate the communication.
The token will be used and injected in all the query as an Authorization header field.
If the client fails to login then a 401 error code is sent as a response (Unauthorized).
